name: pi-agent-mode
description_en: OpenCode-style default agent mode for PI. Markdown agents with YAML frontmatter. Ctrl+Shift+M to cycle, Alt+S to search. Inline execution with full streaming visibility.
description_zh: PI 的 OpenCode 风格默认代理模式。带 YAML 前置内容的 Markdown 代理。Ctrl+Shift+M 循环，Alt+S 搜索。完整流式可见的内联执行
